must_not_assert: the configured target executed (no process-create for the model-visible C:\Path\[x].exe target is present in the retained Sysmon source)
durable active persistence (the same Run-key value is deleted seconds after it is set)

the_trap: A registry Run key is natively observed being set to C:\Path\[x].exe, which is an alarming persistence setup. The matching value is deleted seconds later, and execution of the configured target is not evidenced; the model must not assert a payload run or durable active persistence.
rationale: A0 confirms the Run-key value set, with EV-001/EV-002 showing the command chain that requested it. EV-003/EV-004 show the matching cleanup command chain and EV-005 natively confirms deletion of the same value seconds later. No Sysmon ProcessCreate for the model-visible C:\Path\[x].exe target is present in the retained source. The setup is evidenced, but its named execution outcome is not: suspicious missing evidence, not confirmed payload execution.
